_note: Signal D classification-correctness reference (autoresearch round 2). Each label is the TRUE category for that item in that filing, PROPOSED by reading the filing's own raw Part/Item structure from the canonical bytes -- NOT derived from the production classifier (expectation/_classify_absent/needs_review) or from result.items statuses. Categories: present | legitimately-absent | incorporated-by-reference. This file is HUMAN-ONLY (guard G7): the autoloop may PROPOSE but may not freeze or edit it; Signal D may gate the form-aware fix ONLY against the user-frozen version.
_audit_status: PROPOSED -- AWAITING HUMAN AUDIT. NOT frozen, NOT trusted truth until audited (mirrors the char-gold discipline, playbook section 6). 'uncertain' lists cells where present-as-'None'-section vs legitimately-absent is a judgement call for the auditor.

apple-fy2024.provenance: read-located: TOC declares Items 1-16 across Parts I-IV; Item 6 is [Reserved] (post-2021); Part III (10-14) incorporated by reference from the proxy statement.

msft-fy2023.provenance: read-located: TOC declares Items 1-16; NO Item 1C (FY ended June 2023, before the 1C effective date -> legitimately not-yet-applicable); Part III (10-14) incorporated by reference.

msft-fy1996.provenance: read-located: SGML 1996 old item numbering, Items 1-14; pre-modern items (1A/1B/1C/7A/9A/9B/9C/15/16) did not exist in 1996 -> legitimately not-yet-applicable; Part III (10-13) typically incorporated by reference; Item 14 is the old Exhibits item (present).

chemed-amend-fy2024.provenance: read-located: this 10-K/A (8.7 KB) contains ONLY Part II Item 5 and Part IV Item 15 -- it amends just those two items. Every other item is OUT OF THE AMENDMENT'S SCOPE -> legitimately-absent (NOT an extraction failure). This is the load-bearing amendment case for the form-aware fix.

scwo-fy2025-amend.provenance: read-located: this 10-K/A contains Part III Items 10-14 (present as body text -- the amendment's purpose is to supply Part III that the original incorporated by reference) plus Part IV Item 15. Part I and Part II items 5-9 are OUT OF SCOPE -> legitimately-absent. NOTE the contrast: Part III here is 'present', whereas in a full 10-K it is 'incorporated-by-reference'.
